name: Luggage Tag Black - Open Story™: Adjustable Pebble Pattern Accessory
description:
Make your luggage easily identifiable with the help of this Luggage Tag from Open Story™. This luggage tag features an ID card to jot down your address and phone number for easy identification, and it comes with an adjustable buckle strap for easy attaching to your luggage. Best of all, it features a privacy flap to help you keep your information discreet. Showcasing a faux-leather finish in black with a metallic strap frame and prong, it's sure to add a touch of classic style to your luggage.

Open Story™: Every journey inspires a new chapter.
